name: calculadora-de-paneles
description: Calculadora de Paneles Solares para Colombia

scripts.build:desktop: npm run build -w frontend && rm -rf backend-go/cmd/desktop/frontend/dist && cp -r frontend/dist backend-go/cmd/desktop/frontend/dist && cd backend-go && go build -tags 'production,webkit2_41' -o ../build/calculadora-paneles ./cmd/desktop
scripts.build:desktop:windows: npm run build -w frontend && rm -rf backend-go/cmd/desktop/frontend/dist && cp -r frontend/dist backend-go/cmd/desktop/frontend/dist && cd backend-go && CGO_ENABLED=1 GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -tags production -o ../build/calculadora-paneles.exe ./cmd/desktop
